title: Robert Bruce
compiled_truth: Robert Bruce is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-07-06 to 2002-03-29), Robert Bruce sent 124 and received 938 emails, totalling 1062 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (90), [Mark Taylor](people/mark-taylor) (60), [Tana Jones](people/tana-jones) (47), [Susan Bailey](people/susan-bailey) (35), [Carol Clair](people/carol-clair) (34). Mailbox folders observed: archive, deleted_items, inbox.
